title: Distance Tracking Commands
description:
Distance Tracking Commands

Commands

List of SPEL+ commands for the distance tracking function.

AIO_TrackingSet	:	Sets
		 the distance tracking function

AIO_TrackingStart	:	Starts
		 the distance tracking function

AIO_TrackingEnd	:	Ends
		 the distance tracking function

AIO_TrackingON
		 Function	:	Returns
		 status of the distance tracking function

For details on commands, refer to the following manual:

Epson RC+ 8.0 SPEL+ Language Reference
